n+1 is 20! To mark the occasion we’re introducing the Twentieth Anniversary Tote, aka the Week-end bag, a roomy tote featuring lettering inspired by Godard’s late ’60s title cards. The tote matches our Twentieth Anniversary Print—purchase both items together and get an automatic discount of 20% off each. 
Single-sided design. Features an interior pocket and stands upright when full. 18"W x 14.5"H (3" Gusset). 25" Cotton Web Handle.Made in America at Enviro Tote in New Hampshire.
